---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Grove
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the behavior you would expect, even if the implementation details are still open.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or other approaches you considered.

## Notes

Add screenshots, references, or related issues if useful.
